steps.t: Dwarves of the Kámbrada, Zhélruka, and Abnúzhu can be found at Ashmargathâl, far to the north of Amdân on the slopes of Bundushâthur. Dáin has asked y…
King Shâlim Nightcloak, King Usk, and King Vélat can be found at Ashmargathâl. You have arrived at Ashmargathâl. You should speak to the Kings of the …
Târ-kútoz can be found to the west of Ashmargathâl. The Kings of the Kámbrada, Zhélruka, and Abnúzhu have asked you to scout Târ-kútoz and defeat Azog…
You have done much to hinder Azog's forces at Târ-kútoz and Atrad-zarakh. You should raise a banner of the Haban'akkâ of Thráin at Atrad-zarakh.
